properties.name: security.jwt.secret
properties.description: Signing secret for HMAC-SHA256 JWTs. Must be at least 32 bytes. Injected via @Value in JwtService; supplied per environment (e.g. the JWT_SECRET env var in application.properties).

properties.name: security.jwt.expiration-ms
properties.description: Lifetime of an issued JWT, in milliseconds. Injected via @Value in JwtService.
